• Game canvas, UI overlay, mobile controls, and modals for dashboard, shop, warp, settings, and custom dialogs.
  • Procedural world generation, block mining, building, AOE mining, explosives, heat system, and player stats/upgrades.
  • Networking via MQTT, host election, inventory sync, chat, admin panel, save system, texture manager, and sound engine.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Game.init();

This is a browser‑based mining game with a tiled world, multiplayer sync, and extensive UI components. It supports desktop and mobile layouts, custom textures, and sound with configurable settings. Players can mine, build, trade, and manage upgrades through a shop and inventory system.
